## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7) {#trm1.4.-vertical-flight-efficiency-of-the-descent-pi7 .Heading-2-TZ}

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are on average 53.9 seconds per flight higher in Germany. The highest average time flown level during descent happens at Saarbrücken (EDDR) (452.4 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Hamburg (EDDH) (87.1 seconds per flight).
